metadata.title: Turning a Tight Corner to Outsmart Two Enemies in VALORANT
metadata.description:
A quick move around a tight corner leads to a clutch double kill. See how calm aim and timing can flip the fight.
Where's your favorite spot to catch opponents off guard?

Share your best clutch moments in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
